name: skyagent
description: Codex plugin for Hypixel SkyBlock profile analysis and meta planning.

interface.shortDescription: Analyze Hypixel SkyBlock profiles and plan progression.
interface.longDescription: SkyAgent is a Codex plugin for pulling Hypixel SkyBlock profile data, combining it with wiki and meta sources, and producing practical progression plans.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use SkyAgent to call skyagent_start, load my configured Hypixel SkyBlock context, then recommend the best path toward my current goal.
